proposalReason: Focused live read-only visual smoke review passed, so a separate future proposal draft is justified. This artifact does not enable or execute the proposal.
targetClassAllowed: one existing non-high-risk scalar line in one normal config file with exact line number and no duplicate ambiguity
requiredProofAlreadyPresent: focused live read-only visual smoke review passed
proofStillMissing: explicit user approval for a separate gate-flip sprint
approved Apply integration for the one-target path
productionBackupWriteRereadRecoveryRequi: backup must be created before write
backup bytes must be verified before write
write must affect exactly one expected scalar line
reread verification must confirm expected value from the exact target file
failed verification must trigger the designed recovery path
restore verification must reread the restored file before reporting success
applyIntegrationScope: future proposal may only connect the narrow one-target pilot path after all listed production contracts are active and approved
stopConditions: target is generated, script-managed, script-referenced, symlink-managed, symlink target, high-risk, structured, missing-line, or ambiguous
backup cannot be created and verified before write
write target is not one normal scalar line
recovery restore or restore verification fails
Apply integration differs from approved one-target scope
any required gate remains false in the future sprint
rollbackConditions: write succeeds but reread verification fails
expected setting is missing after write
target file is unreadable after write
